title: Cannot access analytics workspace
description: User is locked out after an SSO provider change.
notes: Workspace owner confirmed SAML metadata was rotated.
Temporary bypass is not approved for production tenants.

title: Delayed refund for annual plan
description: Customer reports that a refund has not posted after cancellation.
notes: Billing team says the refund is inside the processor SLA window.
Follow up if the transfer is still pending after five business days.

title: Webhook retries are noisy
description: Integration owner wants fewer retry notifications during deploys.
notes: Observed retry storm during staging deploy.
